proto.decription: The L2 vlan tag that shall be added (1q,1ad)

area-type.description: Area type. Stub/NSSA areas reduce LSA flooding.

no-summary.description: For stub/NSSA areas, block inter-area routes (totally stubby).

cost.description: OSPFv3 cost for this interface. Lower is preferred.

passive.description: Advertise connected prefixes but do not form adjacencies.

network-type.description: OSPFv3 network type. Affects DR election and hello behavior.

priority.description: Router priority for DR/BDR election. 0 prevents becoming DR.
